what_it_does: Records a raised noticeboard signal that decision d-42 has been decided with the option Approve, and that work gated on decision://global/d-42 may resume.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id, address, type=signal, source=claude_code, state=raised, title 'Decided: d-42 → Approve', author_session=operator
A single link of kind attached_to targeting decision://global/d-42
created and updated timestamps are identical
history contains one transition from null to raised by operator with note 'filed'
Body states the chosen option is Approve and calls the entry a decision.decided signal
channel and thread fields are empty strings
standouts: Gated work is authorized to resume
conventions: YAML frontmatter metadata followed by a Markdown body
Uses id and board:// address identifiers
history array records state transitions with from/to/by/ts/note
Signal/noticeboard schema with type, source, state, author_session
concerns: channel and thread are empty, so routing context is missing
No named lane or actor for the actual resume step
created/updated are identical even though the item is in a mutable state
The decision's subject and scope are not described locally
notes: A raised noticeboard signal announcing that decision d-42 was approved and that downstream work gated on it may resume.
questions: What specific work is gated on decision://global/d-42?
Which lane or operator performs the actual resume step?
What was the decision d-42 about?
Why are channel and thread empty?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose matches what it does: it files and broadcasts a decision.decided approval signal.
apparent_themes: Event logging for workflow state changes
intention_signals: To notify the system that a blocking decision has been resolved with Approve so that downstream, gated work can proceed.
novelty: Uses a decision:// URI and explicit 'resume' semantics tied to a decision approval signal.
contribution: Provides a durable, timestamped, linkable record of a decision approval and an authorization for gated work to resume, which a fused system can use to unblock downstream tasks.
summary_for_embedding: A raised noticeboard signal recording that decision d-42 was decided with option Approve, linking to decision://global/d-42 and stating that work gated on that decision may resume.
intention_for_embedding: To broadcast the approval of decision d-42 and authorize downstream work gated on that decision to resume.
